params.prompt: Vertical portrait photograph for a barbershop brand tile, exact 4:5 aspect ratio, 1080x1350. High-contrast black and white editorial photography, duotone grading with a warm golden-yellow rim/key light used only as an implied light source, never a flat color wash, no straight color photography. Scene: extreme close-up of a man's fingers working a firm dab of beard wax from an open unlabeled round metal tin, then styling the twisted tip of a mustache with the wax, firm confident hold visible, soft blurred barbershop interior in the background, tight product-and-hand detail crop, no full face needed. Absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no graphic overlays, no UI elements anywhere in the image -- pure photography only, a clean background plate.
